title: Rumelange, Esch-sur-Alzette Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rumelange, Esch-sur-Alzette Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rumelange is a city in Esch-sur-Alzette Canton with a population of 5,600. A southern Luxembourg town with a proud mining heritage, home to the National Mining Museum and surrounded by the scenic Red Lands region.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
